How It Works
Intelligent Assessment Matching

A three-stage retrieval-augmented pipeline connects your query to the most relevant SHL assessments, balanced across skill domains.

01

📥 Input Parsing

Accepts job description text, natural language queries, or URLs. Content is extracted, cleaned and structured for retrieval.

02

🔍 Semantic Retrieval

Sentence Transformer embeddings encode your query and 377+ SHL catalogue entries. Cosine similarity surfaces the top candidates.

03

🎯 LLM Reranking

An LLM reranker balances hard skills, soft skills, and type diversity to ensure the final set covers all role requirements.
